author: brunowinter2000
brunowinter2000
text:
RESEARCH UPDATE (2026-01-25):

NEUE REFERENZEN GEFUNDEN:
- qdrant/mcp-server-qdrant (1,183 stars) - Production-ready MCP, FastMCP-basiert, in-memory möglich
- kagisearch/vectordb (778 stars) - Minimalist Python (~200 LOC), FAISS intern, keine externen Deps
- st3v3nmw/sourcerer-mcp (225 stars) - Semantic Code Search, File Watcher Pattern
- unum-cloud/USearch (3,703 stars) - Beste Performance, C++ mit Python Bindings

ARCHITEKTUR-VERGLEICH:
- ChromaDB (ursprünglich im Bead): Braucht Server-Prozess
- vectordb: Pure Python, save()/search() API, eingebautes Chunking
- Qdrant MCP: Klasse erbt von FastMCP, async Tools, Settings via Pydantic

EMPFEHLUNG:
Option A: vectordb wrappen (~50 LOC) - einfachste Lösung
Option B: Qdrant MCP direkt nutzen - schon fertig, aber ~100MB Dependency

OFFENE ENTSCHEIDUNGEN:
1. Use Case: GitHub Code vs lokale Dateien vs beides?
2. Integration: Eigener MCP Server vs in github MCP?

author: brunowinter2000
text: Session 2026-02-12: Partially tested — dispatched github-search subagents for thesis verification. Found and fixed: (1) Sub output lacked file paths (added FILE/VALUE/EVIDENCE format to agent instructions), (2) Sub hallucinated paths (added Path Integrity section), (3) Added Data Verification Output format. Still pending: MCP restart test, full subagent-spawn verification with new instructions.

author: brunowinter2000
text: Process rule: After EVERY verification (match or mismatch), write a brief MCP tool/skill report. Covers: how many tool calls needed, navigation efficiency, any SKILL.md improvement candidates. This is MANDATORY even when verification succeeds quickly — the report captures what worked (reusable patterns) just as much as what failed.

author: brunowinter2000
text: Session 2026-02-12: Verified Sections 5.4.2 (72 patterns, lengths 2-9 in approach_3/patterns_filtered.csv — MATCH), 5.4.4 (Overall MRE 6.25% — MATCH, Q18 highest at 32.61% — MATCH). Q8 tree structure PARTIAL — raw nodes verified but PATTERN ROOT/consumed labels not verified (need predictions.csv or md report, not Test.csv). Multiple SKILL.md and agent instruction improvements made during session: Overview-Dispatch-Verify workflow, FILE/VALUE/EVIDENCE output format, CSV row counting rules, verification scope transparency.

author: brunowinter2000
text:
Session 2 (2026-02-12): Updated evaluation pattern. Now dual-purpose: (1) thesis verification, (2) automation suite improvement.

New workflow established:
- User provides thesis excerpt
- Claude dispatches github-search subagents (Overview->Dispatch->Verify)
- Verification results reported with VERIFIED/NOT VERIFIED scope
- After each verification: assess and improve SKILL.md, agent instructions, CLAUDE.md

Sections verified this session:
- 5.4.2 Datasets: 72 patterns, lengths 2-9 in Hybrid_1/Datasets/Baseline_SVM/approach_3/patterns_filtered.csv — MATCH
- 5.4.4 Ergebnisse: Overall MRE 6.25% in approach_3/A_01a_overall_mre.csv — MATCH
- 5.4.4 Ergebnisse: Q18 highest MRE (32.61%) in approach_3/A_01a_template_mre.csv — MATCH
- Q8 Tree: Node structure verified (Test.csv), PATTERN ROOT/consumed labels NOT verified (need predictions.csv or md report)

Automation suite improvements made:
- SKILL.md: Overview->Dispatch->Verify workflow, FILE/VALUE/EVIDENCE format, CSV row counting, verification scope transparency
- Agent instructions: Path Integrity, Data Verification Output format
- CLAUDE.md: AskUserQuestion rule, Language rule, Editing Automation Files rule

author: brunowinter2000
text: Session 2: Verified Sections 6.2–8.1. All claims MATCH. Key source files identified: Pattern_Selection/{Strategy}/{Config}/selected_patterns.csv, Evaluation/{Strategy}/{Config}/A_01a_overall_mre.csv, Evaluation/Overall/Baseline/A_13_template_comparison.csv, Evaluation/PatternUsage/A_02c_*.csv, Evaluation/Interference/A_02f_*.csv, Dynamic/Runtime_Prediction/Plan_Level/Evaluation/overall_mre.csv, Plan_Level_1/Runtime_Prediction/Baseline_14T_SVM/Evaluation/A_01j_overall_summary.csv, Online_1/Runtime_Prediction/Evaluation/Analysis/{Strategy}/overall_mre.csv. Corrections made: 3.5%→3.6%, Q3→Q13 typo, 194%→193.60%. SKILL.md improved: 6 process rules added (Dispatch First, Rule 7, PROHIBITED general-purpose, Iterate step, Agent DOCS-first, Overview skip).

author: brunowinter2000
text: Section 8.2 verified: Q13/Index Only Scan (unique) MATCH, Q18/Incremental Sort+Merge Join (unique) MATCH. Sources: Prediction_Methods/Operator_Level/Datasets/Baseline/ (03_test.csv, 04a_* dirs, 04b_test_cleaned.csv). Also fixed github-search agent frontmatter (color indentation bug) and documented agent dispatch in global CLAUDE.md.

author: brunowinter2000
text: Session 2: Verified Table 6.5 (Unrounded MRE Q13 Hybrid 2). All three values (Size/Frequency/Error) recalculated from 12_predictions.csv using pd.read_csv + abs(actual-predicted)/actual formula. Size and Frequency: EXACT MATCH. Error: diff 2e-13 (FP noise at double precision limit). Verified with exhaustive variant search (72 combos of columns/formulas/sorts) — no alternative formula matches better. Thesis values are correct.

author: brunowinter2000
text: Session 22.01: .mcp.json verwendet jetzt ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/venv/bin/fastmcp. Muss venv erstellen: cd <plugin-root> && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --quiet fastmcp python-dotenv requests

author: Bruno Winter
text: Session gestartet: Implementiere list_commits, compare_commits, list_releases. API-Endpoints via curl verifiziert (debug/test_results.md). Commits.md + Releases.md in APIEndpoints RAG Collection indexiert (88 + 53 chunks). Topics: kein eigenes Tool, get_repo + search_repos(topic:) reicht.

author: Bruno Winter
text: DONE: list_commits.py, compare_commits.py, list_releases.py implementiert. server.py + DOCS.md + README.md + endpoints.md + SKILL.md + Agent-Docs aktualisiert. Output via curl verifiziert. RAG: Commits.md (88 chunks) + Releases.md (53 chunks) in APIEndpoints indexiert. Topics: kein eigenes Tool, topic: Qualifier in SKILL.md dokumentiert. OPEN: plugin-sync + commit + push.

author: Bruno Winter
text: Commit dee9913 pushed: 3 neue Tools (list_commits, compare_commits, list_releases), SKILL.md + Agent-Docs + DOCS.md + README.md aktualisiert. plugin-sync noch ausstehend.
